code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant User as 👤 User
    participant Browser as 🌐 Browser Panel
    participant Webview as 📱 Webview
    participant Proxy as 🔍 Proxy Monitor
    participant Protocol as 📜 Protocol Handler
    participant Packet as 📦 Packet Analysis
    participant GameState as 🎮 Game State
    participant UI as 🖼️ Traffic UI
    participant Session as 📹 Session Recorder
    participant MCP as 🤖 MCP (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    
    Note over User,MCP: Traffic Capture Flow
    
    User->>Browser: Interact with game
    Browser->>Webview: User action
    Webview->>Proxy: HTTP/AMF Request
    
    rect rgb(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
        Note over Proxy,Protocol: Request Interception
        Proxy->>Proxy: Capture headers & body
        Proxy->>Protocol: Raw packet data
        Protocol->>Protocol: Detect AMF3 format
        Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
        MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded structure
        Protocol->>Packet: Decoded packet
    end
    
    rect rgb(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
        Note over Packet,GameState: State Extraction
        Packet->>Packet: Identify action type
        Packet->>GameState: Update game state
        GameState->>GameState: Track cities, heroes, troops
    end
    
    rect rgb(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
        Note over UI,Session: UI & Recording
        Packet->>UI: Traffic entry
        UI->>UI: Add to traffic list
        UI->>UI: Update counters
        
        alt Recording Active
            Packet->>Session: Record packet
            Session->>Session: Add to session buffer
        end
    end
    
    Proxy-->>Webview: Forward request
    Webview-->>Browser: Response
    
    Note over User,MCP: Response Capture Flow
    
    Browser->>Proxy: Server response
    Proxy->>Protocol: Response packet
    Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded response
    Protocol->>Packet: Decoded response
    Packet->>GameState: Update state
    Packet->>UI: Response entry
    
    Note over User,MCP: Analysis Features
    
    User->>UI: Click traffic entry
    UI->>Packet: Get packet details
    Packet->>UI: JSON + Hex + Headers
    UI->>UI: Display in tabs
    
    User->>UI: Request analysis
    UI->>MCP: analyze_traffic(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
    MCP-->>UI: Patterns & statistics
    UI->>UI: Display analysis

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个完整的流量捕获系统，用来分析游戏客户端和服务器之间的AMF3通信。核心是要让IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode作为边缘节点来处理解码任务。
明白了，IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode作为MCP模块负责解码。那用户侧的起点应该怎么设计？从浏览器开始吗？
对，用户通过Browser Panel操作，然后到Webview，再进入Proxy Monitor做拦截。Proxy Monitor是IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker角色的核心组件。
好的，我画一下：Browser到Webview是用户动作，Webview发HTTP/AMF Request到Proxy。然后Proxy自己先capture headers和body，再转发给Protocol Handler检测格式。
检测格式之后，Protocol Handler要调用MCP的decode_packet方法，这里要标注是IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode节点处理的。然后返回Decoded structure给Packet Analysis模块。
已添加：Protocol检测到AMF3格式后，调用MCP.decode_packet(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)，返回Decoded structure，然后Protocol把Decoded packet传给Packet Analysis。
接下来是状态提取部分，这部分用IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController的颜色标记。Packet Analysis要identify action type，然后更新Game State，跟踪cities、heroes、troops这些数据。
确认：Packet自循环identify action type，然后更新GameState，GameState内部维护城市、英雄、部队的状态追踪。这部分rect用rgb(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)。
UI展示和录制部分用IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode颜色。Packet Analysis把traffic entry发给Traffic UI，UI要add to traffic list并update counters。还要有个alt分支处理Session Recorder的录制。
已画好：Packet到UI是traffic entry，UI自循环add和update counters。alt Recording Active条件下，Packet到Session Recorder，Session内部add to session buffer。
请求链路走完要回到Webview，Proxy用虚线箭头forward request回去，然后Webview响应Browser。之后还要画Response Capture Flow。
添加了：Proxy--Webview虚线返回，Webview--Browser响应。然后Note标注Response Capture Flow，Browser发server response到Proxy。
响应解码流程和请求对称：Proxy到Protocol是response packet，Protocol再调MCP.decode_packet(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)，返回后经过Packet更新GameState，最后到UI显示response entry。
确认对称结构：Protocol-MCP解码，MCP--Protocol返回，Protocol-Packet，Packet-GameState更新，Packet-UI显示response entry。
最后是分析功能。用户点击traffic entry，UI向Packet获取详情，返回JSON + Hex + Headers三种格式，用tabs展示。还要支持调用MCP的analyze_traffic分析IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。
这里有个问题：analyze_traffic的参数应该是IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream吗？还是直接用traffic data？
对，应该是IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream，这是我们定义的遥测流数据类型。MCP返回Patterns & statistics，然后UI展示analysis结果。
已完成：User-UI点击，UI-Packet获取详情，Packet-UI返回JSON+Hex+Headers，UI自循环Display in tabs。然后User请求分析，UI-MCP调用analyze_traffic(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)，MCP返回Patterns & statistics，UI展示analysis。
